name: Signature Golf Society
about: Signature Golf Society is a private, members-only indoor golf experience designed for true enthusiasts. The venue features state-of-the-art Uneekor Eye XO2 launch monitors and GSPro software in a premium, country-club environment, offering 24/7 access without hourly chaos or crowded bays. Membership is capped at 100 members with a maximum of 33 members per bay to ensure maximum availability, and guests are welcome with no guest fees.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to a private, uncrowded facility
Premium Uneekor Eye XO2 launch monitors with tour-level accuracy
Membership includes unlimited guest privileges with no guest fees
Advanced AI swing analysis and real-time performance feedback

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service; BYOB policy likely applies
No mention of alcohol service; guests likely bring their own

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitors with dual high-speed cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Members are responsible for their own clubs as no club rentals are mentioned.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, guests are free and members are responsible for their guests, though no specific food/drink service is mentioned, suggesting a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Exact time is not specified, but members can book 1-hour sessions and combine hours across multiple bookings depending on their membership level.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, members must be 18 years of age, and any guests under 18 must be accompanied by a member at all times.
